tabs.active.description: Tab label for the user's active (owned, live) domains on the My Domains page.

tabs.inactive.description: Tab label for the user's inactive domains on the My Domains page.

tabs.previouslyOwned.description: Tab label for domains the user used to own but no longer holds.

tabs.otherWallets.description: Tab label for domains held in the user's other linked wallets.

tabs.marketplaceOrders.description: Tab label for the user's marketplace listings and offers.

processingBanner.description: Banner shown while some domains are being processed. Uses rich tags: <domains> wraps a count/list of affected domains and <ordersLink> wraps the link to the Orders page — keep both tag pairs intact; 'Orders' is the destination page name.

emptyActive.description: Empty-state message shown when the user has no active domains.

emptyInactive.description: Empty-state message shown when the user has no inactive domains.

emptyPlaceholder.title.description: Title of the empty-state placeholder shown when the user owns no domains at all.

emptyPlaceholder.description.description: Body text of the empty-state placeholder, prompting the user to search for a domain via the button below.

emptyPlaceholder.action.description: Button on the empty-state placeholder that navigates to the domain search page.

columns.selectAll.description: Accessibility label for the header checkbox that selects all rows in the domains table.

columns.selectRow.description: Accessibility label for the per-row checkbox that selects a single domain row.

columns.domainName.description: Table column header for the domain name, with a live count. {count} is the number of domains.

columns.domainNamePlain.description: Table column header for the domain name, without a count.

columns.renewal.description: Table column header for the domain renewal date/info.

columns.autoEns.description: Table column header for the AutoENS toggle. 'AutoENS' is a feature name — keep as-is.

columns.dateTokenized.description: Table column header for the date the domain was tokenized (minted as an NFT).

columns.dnsRecords.description: Table column header for the domain's DNS records.

columns.actions.description: Table column header for the per-row actions menu.

columns.renewUsdPerYear.description: Table column header for the renewal price. Keep the 'USD/yr' unit as-is.

table.searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the filter input above the domains table.

table.emptyMessage.description: Message shown inside the domains table when no rows match the active filters.

table.loadingMessage.description: Message shown inside the domains table while domains are loading.

table.showNftsInWallet.description: Button/label to add the user's domain NFTs to their connected wallet.

table.showNftsInWalletAria.description: Accessibility label for the show-NFTs-in-wallet button. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single NFT, 'other' = multiple NFTs; # is the count.

table.filters.domainName.description: Filter option label for filtering the table by domain name.

table.filters.wallet.description: Filter option label for filtering the table by wallet.

table.filters.renewal.description: Filter option label for filtering the table by renewal.

table.filters.dateTokenized.description: Filter option label for filtering the table by tokenized date.

table.filters.chain.description: Filter option label for filtering the table by blockchain chain.

table.toasts.autoRenewToggled.description: Toast confirming auto-renew was toggled for one domain. {enabled} is select true/other -> 'enabled'/'disabled'; {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

table.toasts.autoRenewToggleFailed.description: Toast shown when toggling auto-renew failed for one domain. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

table.toasts.autoEnsToggled.description: Toast confirming AutoENS was toggled for one domain. {enabled} is select true/other -> 'enabled'/'disabled'; {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated. 'AutoENS' is a feature name.

table.toasts.autoEnsToggleFailed.description: Toast shown when toggling AutoENS failed for one domain. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated. 'AutoENS' is a feature name.

table.toasts.bulkAutoRenewFailed.description: Toast shown when a bulk auto-renew update partially failed. {failed} is the count that failed, {total} is the total attempted.

table.toasts.bulkAutoRenewToggled.description: Toast confirming a bulk auto-renew toggle. {enabled} select true/other -> 'enabled'/'disabled'; ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single domain, 'other' = multiple; # is the count.

table.toasts.noNftsToWatch.description: Toast shown when there are no NFTs available to add to the user's wallet.

table.toasts.nftsAdded.description: Toast confirming NFTs were added to the wallet. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single NFT, 'other' = multiple; # is the count.

table.toasts.nftsAddFailed.description: Toast shown when adding NFTs to the wallet failed. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single NFT, 'other' = multiple; # is the count.

otherWallets.domain.description: Column header for the domain in the 'other wallets' table, with a count. {count} is the number of domains.

otherWallets.nftWallet.description: Column header for the NFT wallet holding the domain in the 'other wallets' table.

otherWallets.order.description: Column header for the related order in the 'other wallets' table.

otherWallets.viewOrder.description: Link/button text to view the order associated with a domain in the 'other wallets' table.

renewModal.title.description: Title of the renew-domains modal. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = 'Renew Domain', 'other' = 'Renew Domains'.

renewModal.descriptionSingle.description: Renew modal description when renewing a single domain. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

renewModal.descriptionMultiple.description: Renew modal description when renewing multiple domains. {count} is the number of domains.

renewModal.renewalPeriod.description: Label for the renewal-period selector in the renew modal.

renewModal.selectYears.description: Placeholder for the years dropdown in the renew modal.

renewModal.yearOption.description: An option in the years dropdown. ICU plural on {years}: 'one' = '# year', 'other' = '# years'; # is the year count.

renewModal.pricePerYear.description: Label for the per-year price line in the renew modal.

renewModal.total.description: Label for the total price line in the renew modal. ICU plural on {years} shown in parentheses: 'one' = '# year', 'other' = '# years'.

renewModal.addingToCart.description: Loading label on the renew modal's add-to-cart button while the request is in progress.

renewModal.addToCart.description: Add-to-cart button in the renew modal.

renewModal.addToCartFailed.description: Error message shown when adding the renewal to the cart failed.

renewPremiumInfo.aria.description: Accessibility label for the renewal-price info tooltip trigger. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

renewPremiumInfo.tooltip.description: Tooltip text explaining that premium domains may have a different renewal price.

renewalCell.auto.description: Short label in the renewal table cell indicating auto-renew is on.

renewalCell.autoRenewAria.description: Accessibility label for the auto-renew toggle in the renewal table cell. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

renewalCell.expired.description: Status text in the renewal table cell when the domain has expired.

renewalCell.usdPerYear.description: Unit suffix shown in the renewal table cell. Keep the 'USD/year' unit as-is.

autoEnsCell.aria.description: Accessibility label for the AutoENS toggle in its table cell. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated. 'Auto-ENS' is a feature name.

timeLeft.expired.description: Compact time-left badge text when the domain has expired.

timeLeft.days.description: Compact time-left badge showing days remaining. {days} is a number; 'd' is the day suffix — keep the format compact.

timeLeft.monthsExact.description: Compact time-left badge showing an exact number of months. {months} is a number; 'm' is the month suffix.

timeLeft.monthsPlus.description: Compact time-left badge showing months-or-more. {months} is a number; 'm+' is the suffix.

timeLeft.yearsExact.description: Compact time-left badge showing an exact number of years. {years} is a number; 'y' is the year suffix.

timeLeft.yearsPlus.description: Compact time-left badge showing years-or-more. {years} is a number; 'y+' is the suffix.

marketplaceExpiry.neverExpires.description: Marketplace listing expiry label indicating the listing never expires.

marketplaceExpiry.expired.description: Marketplace listing expiry label indicating the listing has expired.

marketplaceExpiry.expires.description: Marketplace listing expiry label showing when it expires. {datetime} is a pre-formatted date/time — keep as-is.

nftPendingBadge.minting.description: Pending badge on a domain NFT while it is being minted.

nftPendingBadge.changingExpiration.description: Pending badge on a domain NFT while its expiration is being updated.

nftPendingBadge.changingLock.description: Pending badge on a domain NFT while its lock state is being updated.

nftPendingBadge.pending.description: Generic pending badge on a domain NFT for an in-progress operation.

actions.listForSale.description: Row action menu item to list the domain for sale.

actions.findBuyers.description: Row action menu item to find buyers for the domain.

actions.viewOrder.description: Row action to view the related order (inline/button form).

actions.viewOrderMenu.description: Row action menu item to view the related order (menu form).

actions.viewNft.description: Row action menu item to view the domain's NFT.

actions.viewNftOn.description: Row action menu item to view the domain's NFT on a block explorer. {explorer} is the explorer name, e.g. 'Etherscan' — keep untranslated.

actions.scan.description: Row action menu item to scan the domain.

actions.visitDomain.description: Row action menu item to open/visit the domain in a browser.

actions.showNftInWallet.description: Row action menu item to add the domain's NFT to the connected wallet.

actions.listForSaleAria.description: Accessibility label for the list-for-sale action. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.viewOrderAria.description: Accessibility label for the view-order action. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.findBuyersAria.description: Accessibility label for the find-buyers action. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.viewNftAria.description: Accessibility label for the view-NFT action. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.visitDomainAria.description: Accessibility label for the visit-domain action. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.actionsAria.description: Accessibility label for the row actions menu trigger. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.showNftInWalletAria.description: Accessibility label for the show-NFT-in-wallet action. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.nftAddedToast.description: Toast confirming the domain's NFT was added to the wallet. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.nftAddFailedToast.description: Toast shown when adding the domain's NFT to the wallet failed. {domain} is the domain name — keep untranslated.

actions.nftAddErrorToast.description: Generic toast shown when adding the NFT to the wallet failed.

actions.unknownError.description: Fallback error text used when no specific error message is available.

previouslyOwned.title.description: Page heading for the Previously Owned Domains page (domains the user used to own but no longer holds).

previouslyOwned.columnAccount.description: Table column header for the wallet account a previously owned domain was held in.

previouslyOwned.columnRemovalDate.description: Table column header for the date a previously owned domain left the user's wallet.

previouslyOwned.columnReason.description: Table column header / filter label for why a domain is no longer owned (expired, transferred, exported).

previouslyOwned.columnReceivingWallet.description: Table column header for the wallet that received a domain transferred away from the user.

previouslyOwned.empty.description: Empty-state title shown when the user has no previously owned domains.

previouslyOwned.emptyDescription.description: Empty-state body explaining the user hasn't burned or transferred any domains away from their linked wallets yet.

previouslyOwned.selectChainPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the chain filter dropdown on the Previously Owned Domains page.

previouslyOwned.allChains.description: Chain filter option that shows previously owned domains across all chains.

previouslyOwned.clearFilters.description: Menu item that clears the selected reason filters on the Previously Owned Domains page.

dnsRecords.selectAll.description: Accessibility label for the header checkbox that selects all rows in the DNS records table.

dnsRecords.selectRow.description: Accessibility label for the per-row checkbox that selects a single DNS record row.

dnssec.actionsAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label for the DNSSEC delegation-signers table's actions column header (which has no visible text).

floatingPanel.selected.description: Label in the bulk-selection floating panel indicating how many rows are selected (follows a count).

floatingPanel.clearSelection.description: Button in the floating panel to clear the current row selection.

floatingPanel.auto.description: Short label in the floating panel for the auto-renew control.

floatingPanel.bulkAutoRenewAria.description: Accessibility label for the bulk auto-renew control. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single domain, 'other' = multiple; # is the count.

floatingPanel.bulkAutoRenewMixed.description: Tooltip for the bulk auto-renew control when selected domains have mixed states.

floatingPanel.bulkAutoRenewOn.description: Tooltip for the bulk auto-renew control when auto-renew is enabled for all selected domains.

floatingPanel.bulkAutoRenewOff.description: Tooltip for the bulk auto-renew control when auto-renew is disabled for all selected domains.

floatingPanel.renewAria.description: Accessibility label for the bulk renew button. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single domain, 'other' = multiple; # is the count.

floatingPanel.renewTooltip.description: Tooltip for the bulk renew button. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single domain, 'other' = multiple; # is the count.

floatingPanel.setWebRecords.description: Bulk-action button in the floating panel to set web records for the selected domains.

floatingPanel.setUrlForwarding.description: Bulk-action button in the floating panel to set URL forwarding for the selected domains.

floatingPanel.setEnsRecord.description: Bulk-action button in the floating panel to set the ENS record for the selected domains. 'ENS' is a protocol name — keep as-is.

floatingPanel.showInWalletAria.description: Accessibility label for the bulk show-in-wallet action. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single NFT, 'other' = multiple; # is the count.

floatingPanel.showInWalletTooltip.description: Tooltip for the bulk show-in-wallet action. ICU plural on {count}: 'one' = single NFT, 'other' = multiple; # is the count.

marketplaceOrders.partialLoadNote.description: Note shown when some marketplace listings may not load because their markets are busy.

marketplaceOrders.noLinkedWalletsTitle.description: Empty-state title shown when the user has no linked wallets in the marketplace orders tab.

marketplaceOrders.noLinkedWalletsDescrip.description: Empty-state body prompting the user to link a wallet to see their marketplace orders.

marketplaceOrders.listingsTitle.description: Section heading for the user's active marketplace listings.

marketplaceOrders.listingsDescription.description: Section description for the user's active listings. 'OpenSea' and 'Rarible' are marketplace names — keep untranslated.

marketplaceOrders.noListingsTitle.description: Empty-state title shown when the user has no active marketplace listings.

marketplaceOrders.noListingsDescription.description: Empty-state body explaining that listings created on a domain detail page will appear here.

marketplaceOrders.offersTitle.description: Section heading for the user's offers placed on domains they don't own.

marketplaceOrders.offersDescription.description: Section description for the user's outgoing offers, noting they are sorted by highest price first.

marketplaceOrders.noOffersTitle.description: Empty-state title shown when the user has no outgoing offers.

marketplaceOrders.noOffersDescription.description: Empty-state body explaining that offers placed on other domains will appear here.

marketplaceOrders.incomingBids.description: Label above the list of incoming bids on a listing card.

marketplaceOrders.loadBidsFailed.description: Error text shown when loading bids for a listing failed. {error} is the error message — keep untranslated.

marketplaceOrders.noBidsYet.description: Text shown on a listing card when there are no bids yet.

marketplaceOrders.viewBidAria.description: Accessibility label for the view-bid link. {source} is the marketplace name and {domain} is the domain name — keep both untranslated.

marketplaceOrders.nftAlt.description: Alt text for the NFT image thumbnail on a marketplace card.

marketplaceOrders.offerWaiting.description: Status text on an offer card indicating the offer is open and waiting for the seller to accept.

title.description: UI text: "Marketplace listings aren't supported on {chain} yet".

description.description: UI text: "Listing on Web3 marketplaces isn't allowed while this domain is exportable to other registrars. <link>Contact support</link> to disable export.".
UI text: "Active sale listings across supported marketplaces.".

empty.description: UI text: "No active listings. Use “Create listing” to put this domain up for sale.".

cancelledDescription.description: UI text: "It will disappear from marketplaces within a moment.".

description.description: UI text: "Bids placed on this domain across supported marketplaces. Accepting an offer transfers the NFT to the bidder and credits you the bid amount.".

empty.description: UI text: "No active offers. When a buyer places a bid it will appear here.".

acceptedDescription.description: UI text: "NFT transferred to the bidder.".

description.description: UI text: "Sell this domain on OpenSea. The listing is signed by your wallet and posted to OpenSea's Seaport orderbook.".

noMarketplaces.description: UI text: "No marketplaces support this network yet.".

allListed.description: UI text: "This domain is already listed on every supported marketplace. Cancel an existing listing to relist.".

feeEstimateTooltip.description: UI text: "Final fees are computed by the marketplace at signing time.".

listedToastDescription.description: UI text: "It may take a moment to appear on the marketplace.".

connectWalletError.description: UI text: "Connect a wallet to list this domain.".

alreadyListedError.description: UI text: "This domain already has an active listing there.".

alreadyListedErrorDescription.description: UI text: "Cancel the existing listing before creating a new one.".

invalidPrice.description: UI text: "Enter a valid price greater than 0.".

switchNetwork.description: UI text: "Switch to the correct network to continue.".

errorSignatureCancelled.description: UI text: "Signature cancelled in your wallet.".

errorInsufficientFunds.description: UI text: "Wallet does not have enough native ETH for the approval transaction.".

errorNotConfigured.description: UI text: "The marketplace integration is not configured for this environment.".

errorRateLimited.description: UI text: "The marketplace is rate-limiting requests right now. Wait a minute and try again.".

errorSeaportUnavailable.description: UI text: "Couldn't reach OpenSea's Seaport contract on this network. Make sure your wallet is connected to the same chain as the domain NFT, then try again.".
